key_finding: Male customers around age 45 peak in both customer volume and AOV
business_meaning: This group is the core profit driver of the platform
recommended_action: Launch premium electronics campaigns with expert reviews and VIP services

key_finding: Rural high-value customers show strong preference and high AOV in the Books category
business_meaning: Rural market contains underexplored knowledge consumption demand
recommended_action: Create curated book bundles and knowledge-oriented content campaigns

key_finding: Top 10% customers contribute more than 40% of GMV
business_meaning: Revenue is highly concentrated among premium customers
recommended_action: Prioritize retention resources for top-tier customers

key_finding: Churn-risk users show high historical AOV and preference for electronics
business_meaning: These users are dormant high-value customers rather than low-quality inactive users
recommended_action: Build win-back campaigns with logistics follow-up and electronics upgrade reminders
